name: Partner Fit Rules
purpose: Evaluate broad, demo-safe partner fit for scorecard embeds, referral workflows, or white-label packaging without exposing real partners or provider routing.

boundary.public_safe_summary: Internal routing helpers for funding readiness operations. Use only behind API/server logic.

safety_rules: Do not import this file from browser-facing pages or public widgets.
All names, queues, tags, and workflow references are demo-safe placeholders.
No provider names, provider IDs, affiliate URLs, apply URLs, payout terms, private contacts, borrower PII, credentials, or underwriting notes are included.
Outputs must be treated as readiness routing guidance, not a funding decision, funding offer, or outcome promise.

fit_rules.description: Broker or referral partner wants a safe scorecard intake surface before sending leads to human review.
positive_signals: Agrees not to market score as a funding decision
caution_signals: Requests provider names on public pages
Has no consent or data handling process
fit_rules.safe_positioning: Scorecard can help pre-sort readiness and guide next steps. It does not determine funding outcomes.

fit_rules.description: Marketing or automation agency wants to package the scorecard as a lead magnet for funding-related campaigns.
positive_signals: Can customize copy without adding unsafe claims
caution_signals: Requests fake testimonials or invented success metrics
Wants hidden routing logic in browser code
Wants apply links or affiliate routing exposed publicly
fit_rules.safe_positioning: White-label version supports readiness education, lead capture, and human review handoff.

fit_rules.description: Community, newsletter, membership, or course owner wants a funding readiness tool for entrepreneurs.
positive_signals: Can send users to public scorecard or resource hub
caution_signals: Partner wants to collect sensitive data without clear handling
fit_rules.safe_positioning: Education-first embed that helps members understand readiness gaps and recommended prep steps.

fit_rules.description: Internal operations or processing team needs routing, tags, and document prep workflows.
positive_signals: Has CRM stages or wants them
Can separate public copy from internal notes
caution_signals: Stores sensitive notes in public tools
Lacks owner roles for review tasks
fit_rules.safe_positioning: Internal workflow support for readiness routing and review operations.
